leadText.default: The Jivaka Neuro Centre offers world-class expertise in the diagnosis and treatment of neurological disorders.

content.default: Our multidisciplinary team of neurologists, neurosurgeons, and rehabilitation specialists work together to deliver personalized treatment plans.
